name: Rootly
description: Monitor Rootly incident management for incident response workflows and on-call coverage

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Rootly at https://rootly.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Rootly Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Rootly incident workflows are configured for structured response procedures

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Reviews Rootly incidents to verify active monitoring and alerting is in place
